title: Stainless Steel Ice Bucket, Double-Layer Thermal Insulation Ice Bucket with Lid,Strainer and Ice Tong, Perfect for Home Bar, Restaurant, BBQ, Parties, Clubs (1.3L)
features: 【Double Insulation Barrel Insulation】Double wall-it is made of stainless steel with double insulation layer, which can keep ice frozen for several hours, keeping drinks (wine or champagne) and fruits cool.

【Ice Bucket with Lid Strainer Tongs】The ice container is the perfect addition to any party or cocktail evening. The included small ice tongs easily hang inside the bucket, can be stowed in the lid,does not take up space.

【High Quality】Ice Bucket with Lid and Tongs Set is made of polished quality stainless steel. It’s rigid, anti-deformation and anti-rust. No hesitate, this is an adorable ice bucket for home bar belongs to you.

【Easy to Clean】The bucket is a breeze to clean. Just rinse by hand with soap and warm water for gleam and sparkle.Does not dent, scratch or rust over time.||Warm Note: Never place the bucket in the dishwasher.
【Perfect for Outdoor Activity】Silver theme modern streamline shape blends in your decor indoors and catch eyes outdoors. Perfect for BBQs, parties, bars, clubs, restaurants, hotels etc.
